meta.title: Acrobatic Gymnastics Club Management Software in Chile | Zaltyko - FGCh
meta.description: Manage your federated acrobatic gymnastics club with Zaltyko. Full control over athletes, categories, pairs, groups, difficulty levels and FGCh licenses.

hero.headline: Manage your federated acrobatic gymnastics club with ease
hero.subheadline: Full control over athletes, categories, acrobatic pairs and groups, difficulty levels and licenses. National Championship.

painPoints.generic: Coordinating acrobatic pairs and groups is chaotic. Tracking levels and compositions on paper is a disaster.
painPoints.specific: Managing pair and group combinations, coordinating category changes, tracking D and E scores.
